name: Sparkle Roll Group Limited
summary: Sparkle Roll Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the dealership of auto and non-auto products primarily in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and Malaysia. The company distributes cars of various brands, including Bentley, Lamborghini, and Rolls-Royce; watches under the DeWitt, PARMIGIANI, deLaCour, and Buben & Zorweg brands; and jewelries under the Royal Asscher brand. It also distributes fine red wines under the DUCLOT EXPORT, Domaine d'Eug√É¬©nie, Maison Joanne Bordeaux, Ulysse Cazabonne, Compagnie Medocaine Des Grands Crus, and Chateau D'Yquem brands; audio equipment under the Bang & Olufsen PLAY brand; men's apparel and accessories under the Corneliani brand; and cigars and smoker's accessories. In addition, the company trades in automobile related parts and accessories; and sliver and home accessories, as well as audio and visual consumer electronic products; and offers automobile related after-sale services. Further, it provides management; exhibition and consultancy; insurance agency, property rental, holding, and management; tenancy and sub-tenancy; and catering services, as well as trades in merchandised goods. Additionally, the company develops and invests in films. The company was is based in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
